children.heading: .—Prohibition
children.label: a .—Prohibition
children.text: It shall be unlawful for any person to place a live animal in an overhead storage compartment of an aircraft operated under part 121 of title 14, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: .—Civil Penalty
children.label: b .—Civil Penalty
children.text: The Administrator may impose a civil penalty under section 46301 for each violation of this section.
